meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no testing knowledge
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing and overcome no testing knowledge. This intermediate case study shows freelancers how to ship reliable, high-value code using AI tools.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of testing knowledge, treat SaaS pricing logic as a deterministic state machine. By using Antigravity to scaffold robust architecture and Claude Code to write unit tests based on edge-case scenarios, you ensure your billing logic is bulletproof, repeatable, and client-ready without needing a QA background.
content.intro:
You are staring at a production deploy window, sweat beading on your forehead. Your client expects a bulletproof SaaS pricing engine, but your background is in shipping features, not writing complex test suites. The fear of a calculation error causing a billing nightmare is real, and it is the single biggest bottleneck stopping you from scaling your freelance business.

But the era of manual testing is over. By leveraging intelligent scaffolding and AI-driven verification, you can transform your lack of testing expertise into a competitive advantage. We are going to build a high-precision pricing module that handles edge cases automatically, allowing you to ship with the confidence of a lead engineer.

steps.title: Define the Pricing Schema as Code
steps.description: Establish a rigid JSON schema for your pricing tiers to prevent runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust TypeScript interface for a SaaS pricing engine that supports monthly/yearly billing, discount coupons, and tax calculations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a pricing.ts file based on the generated interface and include validation logic for currency inputs.'

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Scenarios
steps.description: Use AI to generate exhaustive test cases that cover every possible billing edge case.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest test suite for the pricing engine, focusing on boundary conditions like leap years, mid-month upgrades, and expired discounts.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Billing Logic
steps.description: Wrap your calculations in error-handling middleware to ensure no invalid state reaches the payment gateway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a wrapper function that validates the calculated total before passing it to Stripe, ensuring precision is handled via integer-based math (cents).

steps.title: Simulate State Transitions
steps.description: Ensure that user subscription downgrades or upgrades maintain data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a state transition map for user subscription changes that handles prorated refunds and immediate service termination.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Verify the subscription state machine logic against the new pricing engine.'

steps.title: Final Integration Audit
steps.description: Perform a holistic check to ensure the billing logic, tests, and API integration are fully synchronized.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and precision audit on the entire pricing module to flag potential floating-point errors or logic gaps.

pro_tips: Always use integer-based math for pricing; floating-point errors are the silent killer of SaaS billing systems.
Treat your test suite as documentation; if a test is hard to read, your pricing logic is likely too complex.
Use Claude Code to generate 'negative tests'—specifically testing what happens when the API returns an unexpected null value.
Implement a 'dry-run' mode in your pricing engine that logs calculations to a secure file without executing the payment.
Modularize your tax logic into a separate service; tax laws change, and you don't want to rewrite your core billing engine.
content.next_steps: Once the pricing engine is verified, integrate it into a staging environment and run a smoke test using a Stripe test clock to simulate a full year of billing cycles.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting testing anxiety hold your freelance career hostage. Start shipping high-value, high-reliability SaaS tools today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
